## Summary

Describe the change and why it was needed.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks
- [ ] I updated docs if setup, behavior, or workflow changed
- [ ] I did not commit live credentials or secret-bearing local bot files

## Checklist

- [ ] Template files were updated before any local credential-bearing bot copies
- [ ] `README.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` were reviewed where applicable
- [ ] Risk or safety impacts are called out clearly if trading behavior changed

## Notes

Add any context reviewers should know.
